prompt: In Mail, forward an inbox message (any inbox message; ideally one with subject containing 'KinBench 137') to test@example.com — but save as DRAFT, do NOT send. If no seed inbox message exists, create a fallback NEW draft with subject 'Fwd: KinBench 137' to test@example.com. Fast path for fallback: `cerebellum 'mail draft_with_to "Fwd: KinBench 137" test@example.com "Forwarded body"'`.
